reviewer.evidence: Layer-1 (rev-iq3) FAILed the iq3 candidate on TWO constructs, both NEEDS_USER: (1) the cross-symbol pointer-derivation FAKEs (idx_1495 tbl-derived; D_800F19C0 reg-relative/rebase) - reviewer finds they fit NO existing sanctioned family (not defeat-combine-symbol-fold, not pointer-alias) and were never independently sanctioned (the 2026-07-03 owner ruling covered ONLY staged-value-reused-variable; the cross-symbol FAKEs rode along unreviewed since before d9e490c0 - NOTE this applies retroactively to the restored mh5 candidate.c too, which carries the same family); (2) iq3's `+= 1; += 1;` double-split - over-generalizes the PROVISIONAL split-init-accumulation sanction (memo explicitly forbids adjacent spellings without a new ruling); its stated purpose is refs/allocno-priority inflation. Both constructs are LOAD-BEARING (measured: without #1 the head folds, masked 30 all subsets; without the double-split p78 stays at 7 refs/933 and the web loses two seats, masked 16 vs 6). PASSED: printf-block v0/pp staging (staged-value-reused-variable + pointer-alias), saved &= 3 split, goto control shape. Surfaced to owner 2026-07-05; iq3 form banked under rejected/cross-symbol-fake-plus-double-split.c pending rulings.
